name: cicd-deploy
appliesWhen: any deploy/delivery agent runs, OR the project needs a pipeline

officialRepos.name: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials
officialRepos.why: Keyless AWS auth from GitHub Actions via OIDC. The way to authenticate CI to AWS without long-lived keys.

officialRepos.name: actions/cache
officialRepos.why: Dependency / build artifact caching keyed on lockfile hashes.

officialRepos.name: aws-samples/aws-codedeploy-examples
officialRepos.why: appspec.yml + lifecycle hooks for EC2 blue/green and canary deploys with auto-rollback.

officialRepos.name: aws-samples/aws-lambda-deploy
officialRepos.why: Lambda versioned aliases + CodeDeploy traffic shifting (canary/linear) with CloudWatch alarm rollback.

officialRepos.name: actions/starter-workflows
officialRepos.why: Reference GitHub Actions pipeline templates (build/test/deploy) across stacks.

officialRepos.name: codemagic-ci-cd/codemagic-sample-projects
officialRepos.why: Mobile (Flutter/iOS/Android) build, code signing, and store-publish pipelines.
